lineage.Process: ExportFeatures cb_2025_us_state_5m "C:\Users\Hope McBride\OneDrive - UW-Madison\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\575finalprojection\575finalprojection.gdb\cb_2025_us_50_states" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "STATEFP "STATEFP" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,STATEFP,0,1;STATENS "STATENS" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,STATENS,0,7;GEOIDFQ "GEOIDFQ" true true false 11 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,GEOIDFQ,0,10;GEOID "GEOID" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,GEOID,0,1;STUSPS "STUSPS" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,STUSPS,0,1;NAME "NAME" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,NAME,0,99;LSAD "LSAD" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,LSAD,0,1;ALAND "ALAND" true true false 14 Double 0 14,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,ALAND,-1,-1;AWATER "AWATER" true true false 14 Double 0 14,First,#,cb_2025_us_state_5m,AWATER,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures cb_2025_us_states "C:\Users\Hope McBride\OneDrive - UW-Madison\GEOG 574\finalproj\cb_2025_us_states.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "STATEFP "STATEFP" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,STATEFP,0,1;STATENS "STATENS" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,STATENS,0,7;GEOIDFQ "GEOIDFQ" true true false 11 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,GEOIDFQ,0,10;GEOID "GEOID" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,GEOID,0,1;STUSPS "STUSPS" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,STUSPS,0,1;NAME "NAME" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,NAME,0,99;LSAD "LSAD" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,LSAD,0,1;ALAND "ALAND" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,ALAND,-1,-1;AWATER "AWATER" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,AWATER,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_us_states,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures cb_2025_48_states "C:\Users\Hope McBride\OneDrive - UW-Madison\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\575finalprojection\575finalprojection.gdb\cb_2025_48_states_ExportFeatures" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "STATEFP "STATEFP" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,STATEFP,0,1;STATENS "STATENS" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,STATENS,0,7;GEOIDFQ "GEOIDFQ" true true false 11 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,GEOIDFQ,0,10;GEOID "GEOID" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,GEOID,0,1;STUSPS "STUSPS" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,STUSPS,0,1;NAME "NAME" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,NAME,0,99;LSAD "LSAD" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,LSAD,0,1;ALAND "ALAND" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,ALAND,-1,-1;AWATER "AWATER" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,AWATER,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb_2025_48_states,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

Project cb_2025_48_states_ExportFeatures "C:\Users\Hope McBride\OneDrive - UW-Madison\GEOG 574\finalproj\cb2025_48states_albers" PROJCRS["NAD_1983_2011_USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic",BASEGEOGCRS["GCS_NAD_1983_2011",DYNAMIC[FRAMEEPOCH[2010.0],MODEL["HTDP"]],DATUM["D_NAD_1983_2011",ELLIPSOID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101],ANCHOREPOCH[2010.0]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["Latitude (lat)",north,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Longitude (lon)",east,ORDER[2]],ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],CONVERSION["Albers",METHOD["Albers"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-96.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",29.5],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",45.5],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",37.5]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["Easting (X)",east,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2]],LENGTHUNIT["Meter",1.0],ID["Esri","54093"]] 'WGS_1984_(ITRF00)_To_NAD_1983 + WGS_1984_(ITRF08)_To_NAD_1983_2011' GEOGCRS["GCS_North_American_1983",DATUM["D_North_American_1983",ELLIPSOID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["Latitude (lat)",north,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Longitude (lon)",east,ORDER[2]],ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG","4269"]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

ExportFeatures cb2025_48states_albers "C:\Users\Hope McBride\OneDrive - UW-Madison\GEOG 574\finalproj\cb2025_final_48states_albers.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,OBJECTID,-1,-1;STATEFP "STATEFP" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,STATEFP,0,1;STATENS "STATENS" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,STATENS,0,7;GEOIDFQ "GEOIDFQ" true true false 11 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,GEOIDFQ,0,10;GEOID "GEOID" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,GEOID,0,1;STUSPS "STUSPS" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,STUSPS,0,1;NAME "NAME" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,NAME,0,99;LSAD "LSAD" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,LSAD,0,1;ALAND "ALAND" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,ALAND,-1,-1;AWATER "AWATER" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,AWATER,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Le_1 "Shape_Le_1" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,Shape_Le_1,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,cb2025_48states_albers,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

Project cb2025_final_48states_albers "C:\Users\Hope McBride\OneDrive - UW-Madison\GEOG 574\finalproj\cb2025_48state_WGS84" GEOGCRS["GCS_WGS_1984",DYNAMIC[FRAMEEPOCH[1990.5],MODEL["AM0-2"]],DATUM["D_WGS_1984",ELLIPSOID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["Latitude (lat)",north,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Longitude (lon)",east,ORDER[2]],ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG","4326"]] WGS_1984_(ITRF08)_To_NAD_1983_2011 PROJCRS["NAD_1983_2011_USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic",BASEGEOGCRS["GCS_NAD_1983_2011",DYNAMIC[FRAMEEPOCH[2010.0],MODEL["HTDP"]],DATUM["D_NAD_1983_2011",ELLIPSOID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101],ANCHOREPOCH[2010.0]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],CS[ellipsoidal,2],AXIS["Latitude (lat)",north,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Longitude (lon)",east,ORDER[2]],ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],CONVERSION["Albers",METHOD["Albers"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-96.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",29.5],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",45.5],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",37.5]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["Easting (X)",east,ORDER[1]],AXIS["Northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2]],LENGTHUNIT["Meter",1.0],ID["Esri","54093"]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
